meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to debug with AI and overcome the no-portfolio trap. A beginner-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your SaaS launch.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; founders solve it by shipping functional, debugged MVPs. Use AI-driven debugging to transform broken code into polished case studies. By automating the root-cause analysis with tools like Claude Code and Antigravity, you slash development time, prove your technical competence, and ship revenue-generating software faster.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank repository, the weight of 'no portfolio' hanging over your head like a lead anchor. Every day you spend stuck in a cycle of syntax errors and unoptimized logic is another day your SaaS sits in the dark, invisible to the market. The industry doesn't care about your resume; it cares about your ability to ship.

But the game has changed. You don't need years of debugging experience when you have machine-speed intelligence at your fingertips. By leveraging AI-first development workflows, you can turn complex technical debt into a showcase of high-performance product engineering. It’s time to stop debugging manually and start building your legacy.

steps.title: Define the Bug Scope
steps.description: Before fixing, isolate the failure point to ensure the AI focuses on the business-critical path.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this code module for performance bottlenecks and logic errors that could impact user conversion rates.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the error stack and identify the exact line causing the runtime failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Explain the root cause of this stack trace and suggest three ways to refactor for better robustness.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Trace the error in the current directory and explain why it happens'

steps.title: Implement Defensive Refactoring
steps.description: Rewrite the broken logic to be production-ready and scalable, ensuring your portfolio shows clean code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this function to handle edge cases and implement type-safe error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'Refactor the function in auth.ts to include robust error handling'

steps.title: Generate Unit Tests
steps.description: Build credibility by demonstrating that your code is tested and reliable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite for this module using Jest to ensure zero regressions.

steps.title: Document the Fix for Portfolio
steps.description: Turn your debugged code into a case study by generating technical documentation for your README.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a 'Technical Challenges Overcome' section for my README, detailing how I solved this complex bug.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Write a professional README entry describing the problem and the technical solution'

pro_tips: Treat every bug you fix as a feature story: document the 'why' to demonstrate architectural thinking to future investors.
Always set your AI system prompt to 'Senior Staff Engineer' to force higher-quality, more performant code suggestions.
Use Claude Code to audit your dependencies; security vulnerabilities are a red flag in any portfolio project.
Automate your CI/CD pipeline early; a project that deploys automatically is twice as impressive as one that doesn't.
Focus on solving one complex 'edge-case' bug rather than ten simple syntax errors; complexity sells your expertise.
content.next_steps: Once your code is debugged and documented, push to GitHub, update your landing page with the new features, and share the 'Build Log' on X or LinkedIn to gain immediate market traction.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting 'no portfolio' stall your SaaS dreams. Leverage AI to ship faster, debug smarter, and prove your value to the world. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
